# neon_snapshot (Resource)

Manages a Neon snapshot.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_snapshot" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  branch_id  = "your-branch-id"
  name       = "my-snapshot"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID to create the snapshot from.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Optional

- `expires_at` (String) The time at which the snapshot will be automatically deleted. Use ISO 8601 format.
- `lsn` (String) The target Log Sequence Number (LSN) to take the snapshot from. Must fall within the restore window. Cannot be used with `timestamp`.
- `name` (String) A name for the snapshot.
- `timestamp` (String) The target timestamp for the snapshot. Must fall within the restore window. Use ISO 8601 format. Cannot be used with `lsn`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The snapshot ID.
- `manual` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot was manually created.
- `source_branch_id` (String) The ID of the branch the snapshot was created from.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import neon_snapshot.example <project_id>/<snapshot_id>
```
